page_title: Neon Genesis Evangelion TV Animation Setting Material Collection 2015 edition
text:
is an artbook published by Groundworks Co., ltd. on 07 August 2015. It was published in North America by Udon Entertainment on 03 September 2019.

Overview

It contains a wide range of "setting materials" at the time of TV animation production. This material collection contains the setting materials at the time of production of the TV animation Neon Genesis Evangelion, which began broadcasting in 1995. It also include some settings of the The End of Evangelion film.

Setting materials (Also known as Settei) are a collection of materials necessary for on-site staff to draw characters, mechanics, etc. during animation production.

Table of Contents

Characters
Evangelions & Angels
Machines & Locations
Movie

Staff
